title: op stuff
description: add new op stuff for minecraft like swords and picaxes
body:
🔹 Overpowered Pickaxes
Mine entire veins in seconds, break blocks instantly, and tear through terrain like never before. Whether you're strip mining or clearing mountains, these tools make everything effortless.

🔹 Devastating Swords
Deal massive damage to mobs and bosses alike. With enhanced attack power and special effects, every swing feels unstoppable.

🔹 Balanced for Fun
While extremely powerful, the items are crafted using rare or expensive recipes to keep gameplay rewarding and progression meaningful.

🔹 Perfect for Endgame & Chaos Runs
Great for players who want to speed up gameplay, experiment with power, or just have fun destroying everything in sight.

💡 Whether you're a builder, explorer, or fighter — this mod gives you the ultimate tools to play your way… but stronger.
